title: Expensive and uncomfortable
question: 把今天的“奇怪发现 + 安全求助 + 解释原因”放进学校储藏室场景：你和老师发现一个 delivery box 特别重，不独自打开，而是说明情况。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: No one could account for the fact that the box was extremely heavy. It occurred to me to ask a teacher for help. We did not open it alone. Later, a student admitted putting extra books in the box. It was dangerous and not worth it.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 用 account for 表达没人解释得清：没人能解释为什么这个箱子特别重
options.english_template: No one could ___ the fact that the box was extremely heavy.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用 It occurred to me to... 表达“我突然想到去找老师帮忙”
options.english_template: It ___ to ask a teacher for help.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 说明安全边界：我们没有独自打开它

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 用 admit doing 表达承认做过某事：后来，一个学生承认把额外的书放进箱子里
options.english_template: Later, a student ___ extra books in the box.

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 给出判断：这很危险，不值得
